title: iria spiralis
intro: Iria spiralis, also known as the twisted club moss, is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the genus Lycopodiopsida. It is a flowering plant that has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Iria spiralis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and even exhibit anti-cancer properties. Iria spiralis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or capsules, making it a versatile option for those seeking natural remedies.
